Yr,Co,Crcy,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,Flex2,TP,TPname,PC,Flex5,Flex9,Flex8,TTY,Flex4,Amt1,Amt2
Year,CoCd,Crcy,MapKeyLvl4,MapKeyName,Account,Account Name,ACD,Trading Partner,TP Descr,Profit Center,Product,Portfolio PC,Portfolio Name,TTY,TTYtype,Doc Amt,LC2 Amt
Yr,Co,GL,PC,UWYr
Data 2 - original
G:J
J
UWYr,Crcy,Flex8,Division,Flex5,Flex2,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4
UW Year,Crcy,Portfolio,Div,Product,ACD,PY ULAE Orig,CY ULAE Orig,PY ULAE USD,CY ULAE USD
Flex8,UWYr,Flex2,Crcy
n
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (Amt1 = 0 or Amt2 = 0)
update TransX set BusCat = '' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and BusCat = 'XX'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'A'  from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex2 = 'C' from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and (substring(GL,1,2) = '14' or BusCat like '3%')

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr, Co, Crcy, GL, TP,PC,Flex2, TTY,UWYr,Amt1,Amt2,Flex3) (Select KeyID, Yr, Co, Crcy, GL, TP,PC,Flex2, TTY,UWYr, round(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2) as Amt1, round(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2) as Amt2, 'pass2' as Flex3 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Yr, Co, Crcy, GL, TP, PC, Flex2, TTY,UWYr)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex3 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0
update TransX set GLdesc = c.Descr from TransX t inner join COA c on t.GL = c.GL where KeyID = '[batchID]'
update TransX set Flex5 = p.Product from TransX t inner join PCTRS p on t.PC = p.PCTR where KeyID = '[batchID]'

update TransX set Flex6 = Mapkey from TransX t inner join mapkeyranges m on t.GL >= m.fromGL and t.GL <=m.thruGL where keyID = '[batchID]' and mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%' and not mapkey like 'M1-_-%-%-%-%'
update TransX set Flex7 = m.Name from TransX t inner join mapkeys m on t.flex6 = m.mapkey where keyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex9 = '7' + m1.field2 + m2.field2 + x.Flex2 + 'N' + (case when x.TP like 'F%' then 'A' else 'T' end) + 'P0' from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'

Update x set Flex8 = x.Flex2 + '-' + m1.field3 + '-' + x.Flex5, Division = m1.field2 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m1 on m1.Field1 = x.Co and m1.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m1.ID = 'PC' and m1.Descr = 'Co' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update x set Flex5 = m2.field2 from TransX x inner join Misc_Tables m2 on m2.Field1 = x.Flex5 and m2.Table_ID = 'IR17' and m2.ID = 'PC' and m2.Descr = 'Product' where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set TPname = CASE WHEN TP = '' THEN '3rd' WHEN SUBSTRING(TP,1,1) = 'F' THEN 'FFH' ELSE 'ODY' END where KeyID = '[batchID]'
Update TransX set Flex4 = CASE WHEN TTY IN ('','821','822') THEN 'Incurred' ELSE 'Other' END where KeyID = '[batchID]'

insert into TransX (KeyID, Yr,Co,Crcy,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,Flex2,TP,TPname,PC,Flex5,Flex9,Flex8,TTY,Flex4,Amt1,Amt2) (select KeyID + '-data2', Yr,Co,Crcy,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,Flex2,TP,TPname,PC,Flex5,Flex9,Flex8,TTY,Flex4,ROUND(SUM(Amt1),2),ROUND(SUM(Amt2),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' group by KeyID, Yr,Co,Crcy,Flex6,Flex7,GL,GLdesc,Flex2,TP,TPname,PC,Flex5,Flex9,Flex8,TTY,Flex4)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and TTY <> '822'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not TP = ''
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Co like '_999'
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and GL >= '5210000' and GL <= '5299999'

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt3) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Yr <> [Yr] and Flex1 is NULL)

insert into TransX (KeyID,Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt2,Amt4) (select KeyID,'pass2' as Flex1,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2 from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 is NULL

insert into TransX (KeyID,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,Amt1,Amt2,Amt3,Amt4) (select KeyID,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8,ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt1,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt2,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt3,0)),2),ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(Amt4,0)),2) from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Flex1 = 'pass2' group by KeyID,UWYr,Crcy,Flex2,Division,Flex5,Flex8)
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and not Flex1 is NULL
delete from TransX where KeyID = '[batchID]' and Amt1 = 0 and Amt2 = 0 and Amt3 = 0 and Amt4 = 0
